opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: [Bystander reports] He hit the tree going at least 100km/h, he isn't waking up, and there's blood everywhere!
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: High-speed single-vehicle collision with an unconscious, entrapped driver.

symptom_narrative.character: unconsciousness with visible severe bleeding and leg deformity
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: [Bystander reports] initially snoring, now shallow irregular breathing, large scalp wound bleeding heavily, obvious deformity of the left thigh
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: unknown, bystander has no knowledge of the driver's medical history
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: unconscious, entrapped in the driver's seat of the vehicle

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: bystanders present at the scene, 000 already contacted

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: bystanders desperately want to know what to do while waiting for help

access_barriers.transport: not applicable — emergency services already required, patient entrapped
